title: TAngible iNterface thought Gama Orchestration (TANGO)
description: An open-source research framework designed to bridge the gap between digital and physical simulations by using the GAMA platform to orchestrate a fleet of modular, low-cost robots that embody complex agent-based models in real time.

title: Sustainability Issues Metaverse for building Participatory Learning Environments (SIMPLE)
description: The general objective of SIMPLE is to raise awareness of young audiences on the challenges of finding sustainable solutions to environmental problems by developing, testing, and delivering a “sustainability metaverse”, i.e., an infrastructure and a set of pedagogical methods based on immersive virtual reality environments, serious games, and scientific simulations.

title: Smart Agro-ecological Transformation of Farming Systems towards Resilience and Sustainability in Middle and Coastal Zones of the Viet Nam Mekong Delta (STAR-FARM)
description: The overall objective of the STAR-FARM project is to facilitate smart agro-ecological transformation of agri-food farming systems of the Viet Nam’s Mekong Delta (VMD) and strengthen resilience to climate change, environmental degradation, and other external shocks.

title: COvid19 MOdeling KIT (COMOKIT)
description: Building a modeling kit written in GAMA for analyzing and comparing interventions against the COVID-19 epidemic at the scale of a city.

title: Exploring by Simulation Cities Awareness on Population Evacuation (ESCAPE)
description: ESCAPE is a research project developing agent-based simulation tools to help decision-makers design and evaluate mass evacuation strategies in urban areas facing natural or technological disasters.

title: Hoan Kiem Air
description: Simulating traffic and air pollution in Hanoi's Hoan Kiem district using an agent-based model on the GAMA platform, helping authorities and the public evaluate the impact of pedestrianization on air quality.
